get.description: This API fetches details of all actions — called events — performed on a ticket and in the sub-tabs on the ticket detail page. To view a detailed documentation for this API, visit this page.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: Key that filters details of actions performed by a particular agent. Value allowed is the agent's ID in Zoho Desk.

schema.description: Key that filters details of actions performed by a particular agent. Value allowed is the agent's ID in Zoho Desk.

parameters.name: fieldName
parameters.description: Key that filters the history of a particular field. The value for this key must be the apiName of the field.

schema.description: Key that filters the history of a particular field. The value for this key must be the apiName of the field.

parameters.name: eventFilter
parameters.description: Key that filters events, based on their type. Values allowed are: @CommentHistory@, @TimeEntryHistory@, @TaskHistory@, @CallHistory@, @EventHistory@, @AttachmentHistory@, @ApprovalHistory@, @SuperviseHistory@, @WorkflowHistory@, @MacroHistory@, @AssignmentRuleHistory@, @NotificationRuleHistory@, @SLAHistory@, @BlueprintHistory@ and @SkillRelatedHistory@

schema.description: Key that filters events, based on their type. Values allowed are: @CommentHistory@, @TimeEntryHistory@, @TaskHistory@, @CallHistory@, @EventHistory@, @AttachmentHistory@, @ApprovalHistory@, @SuperviseHistory@, @WorkflowHistory@, @MacroHistory@, @AssignmentRuleHistory@, @NotificationRuleHistory@, @SLAHistory@, @BlueprintHistory@ and @SkillRelatedHistory@

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Index number, starting from which the events must be fetched

schema.description: Index number, starting from which the events must be fetched
